headline: Dependency Injection
description: Dependency Injection (DI) is a technique where objects receive their dependencies from outside rather than creating them internally. It enables loose coupling, testability (mock dependencies), and centralized configuration.

citation.name: Dependency Injection: Principles, Practices, and Patterns (2nd Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Seemann M., Deursen S.

citation.name: Inversion of Control Containers: A 2025 Comparative Analysis
citation.author: multiple
